title: Create: No Entities
description: Create addon for recipes without entities.
body:
# Create: No Entities

_Do you want to automate Blaze Cakes and need many eggs? But a box with hundreds of chickens cause too much lag? With this addon you can now automate eggs without chickens!_

This small mod adds a few items and fluids to automate the production of eggs. The mod allows you to craft items that normally require entities without having hundreds of mobs in your world.

At this time only eggs can be crafted, but more recipes for milk and honey will come in the future.
